
<!--
### Full Model Without Committee Leadership Positions

```{r, eval = FALSE}
##| label: tbl-models_full_majority
#| tbl-cap: "Interbranch Representation (Without Committee Leadership Positions)"
#| out-width: 100%

load(here::here("models", type,  "models_full_majority.Rdata"))

modelsummary(models_full_majority,
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator.",
                          "This table shows estimates the relationship between district demographics that may affect demand and levels of interbranch representation.")) 
```
--> 



### Demand

```{r}
##| label: tbl-models-demand
#| tbl-cap: "The effect of demand on requests to federal agencies"
#| out-width: 100%

load(here::here("models", type,  "models_demand.Rdata"))

modelsummary(models_demand,
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator.",
                          "This table shows estimates the relationship between district demographics that may affect demand and levels of interbranch representation.")) 
```

\clearpage

### Capacity

<!--
Columns 1, 3, and 5 show differences across legislators with different capacity advantages.
--> 

```{r}
##| label: tbl-models-capacity
#| tbl-cap: "The effect of capacity on total requests to federal agencies"
#| out-width: 100%

load(here::here("models", type,  "models_capacity.Rdata"))

modelsummary(models_capacity,
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator.",
                          "This table shows estimates of the effect of legislator capacity (committee chair, subcommittee chair, and ranking member positions and years in office) and institutional positions that may affect strategic behavior (oversight committee membership, majority party status, co-partisan president) on levels of interbranch representation.")) 
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
##| label: fig-effect
#| fig-cap: "Predicted levels of interbranch representation per legislator per year compared to counterfactuals"
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - ""
#|   - ""
#|   - ""
#|   - ""
#| layout-ncol: 2
#| out-width: 100%

knitr::include_graphics(
here::here("figs", type,
           paste0("m-effect-",
                  c(1:2,5,8), 
                  ".png"
                  ) 
           ))
```

\clearpage


##### Electoral turnover and staff prior experience representing the district

```{r}
##| label: tbl-models-district
#| tbl-cap: "The effect of capacity on total requests to federal agencies per district"

load(here::here("models", type,  "models_district.Rdata"))

modelsummary(models_district,
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by district",
                          "This table shows estimates of the effect of electing a new member of the same or different party on levels of interbranch representation.")) 
```


\clearpage

### Strategic Responses to the Environment

#### Interbranch representation as electoral strategy

```{r}
##| label: tbl-models-elect
#| tbl-cap: "The effect of electoral security on total requests to federal agencies"
#| out-width: 60%

load(here::here("models", type,  "models_elect.Rdata"))

modelsummary(models_elect,
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator.",
                          "This table shows estimates of the effect of electoral competition on levels of interbranch representation. "))  

```
